usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All REST endpoints behaved correctly. Health checks respond sub-millisecond. Guides API returns 25 well-structured entries with full content on detail pages. Auth enforcement is solid — all authenticated endpoints return 401 without a token. Trip sharing lifecycle works end-to-end: share generates token, public fetch works, unshare invalidates the token immediately. Error handling returns appropriate 401/404 codes with no 500s.
